title: Settlement Entity Registry
description: Populated at authoring time with real game data for a specific settlement. The sub-agent receives one of these per settlement and must only reference entities that appear here.

name.description: Procedurally generated settlement name. Referenced in pool entries via {settlement_name}.

type.description: Settlement size category. Affects NPC count and POI availability.

npcs.description: All named NPCs in this settlement. Referenced in pool entries via {npc_name}, {npc_name_2}, etc.

role.description: NPC's functional role in the settlement.

role_display.description: Human-readable role as a common noun (e.g., 'tavern keeper', 'blacksmith'). Pre-computed from role.

disposition.description: Base disposition (0-100). Higher = friendlier. Affects tone framing, not pool entry content.

poi_types.description: POI types present in or near the settlement. Referenced in pool entries via {poi_type}. Only the type is known: no interior details, no sub-features.

mob_types.description: Creature/enemy types that spawn in the area around this settlement. Referenced in pool entries via {mob_type}.

nearby_settlements.description: Names of other settlements the NPC might have heard of. Referenced in pool entries via {other_settlement}.

_template_variables.description: Reference for variable syntax used in pool entry text. All variables use {curly_brace} syntax and are resolved at runtime by DialogueResolver.

variables.{npc_name}: Name of another NPC in the same settlement (first reference).
variables.{npc_name_2}: Name of a second NPC (when entry references two NPCs).
variables.{self_role}: The speaking NPC's own role as a common noun (e.g., 'cook', 'guard'). Use for self-referential job talk.
variables.{npc_role}: Role of the NPC referenced by {npc_name} (e.g., 'guard', 'blacksmith'). Always resolves to the correct role for whichever NPC {npc_name} resolves to.
variables.{poi_type}: A POI type from the registry (e.g., 'mine', 'farm'). Use as a common noun, not a proper name.
variables.{mob_type}: A mob type from the registry (e.g., 'goblins', 'wolves'). Use as a common noun.
variables.{food_type}: A food item (drop-in pool: bread, cheese, grilled fish, apple pie, etc.). Use in mundane daily life.
variables.{crop_type}: A farmable crop (drop-in pool: wheat, corn, carrots, etc.). Best with farm POI context.
variables.{wildlife_type}: A passive animal or bird (drop-in pool: deer, fox, owl, etc.). NOT hostile mobs.
variables.{resource_type}: A resource or material (drop-in pool, filtered by POI: iron for mine, flour for mill, etc.). Falls back to general pool without POI context.

_example_populated.description: Example of a fully populated registry for one settlement.
